nodes.name: Cron 06:30 KL
nodes.notes: Daily at 06:30 Asia/Kuala_Lumpur. Set timezone in n8n global settings (Settings → General → Timezone) OR on this node's 'Trigger Timezone' if available, else cron runs in UTC.

nodes.name: Fetch Daily Prep
nodes.notes: Uses Header Auth credential. Create it in n8n: Credentials → New → Header Auth → Name='Authorization', Value='Bearer <YOUR_N8N_API_KEY>'. IMPORTANT: hit www.incredibowl.my (not incredibowl.my) — apex 307-redirects and curl/n8n drops Authorization across the hop.

nodes.name: Format Template Vars
nodes.notes: Maps endpoint JSON → 6 template variables. Edit here if you change the WhatsApp template later.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Template
nodes.notes: Send template message. WhatsApp Cloud API requires the recipient to have messaged your WABA within 30 days (BowlMama needs to send 'Hi' once for opt-in). Phone Number ID comes from Meta Business Suite → WhatsApp Manager → Phone numbers. Template MUST be APPROVED before this works.

nodes.name: Log Error
nodes.notes: Catch-all error logger. Swap for Slack/Email/Telegram node to actually be notified when 06:30 push fails. Right now this only writes to n8n execution logs.
